mapper.select: SELECT wo.warehousing_id, wo.purchase_id, wo.operator_id, wo.warehousing_time, wo.audit_status, wo.auditor_id, wo.audit_time, wo.remarks, wo.create_time AS wo_create_time, wo.update_time AS wo_update_time, wo.is_deleted, woi.item_id, woi.warehousing_id AS woi_warehousing_id, woi.batch_id, woi.actual_in_qty, woi.create_time AS woi_create_time, db.drug_id, db.batch_no, db.production_date, db.expiry_date, d.drug_name, d.specification FROM warehousing_order wo LEFT JOIN warehousing_order_item woi ON wo.warehousing_id = woi.warehousing_id LEFT JOIN drug_batch db ON woi.batch_id = db.batch_id LEFT JOIN drug d ON db.drug_id = d.drug_id WHERE wo.warehousing_id = #{warehousingId} AND wo.is_deleted = 0
